# clash

`clash` provides an R interface to the [Clash of Clans
API](https://developer.clashofclans.com/#/).

## Installation

You can install the development version of `clash` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("christopherkenny/clash")
```

## Example

Current endpoints are included for cards, rankings, tournaments,
players, and clans.

To get a player’s data, we can use:

``` r

library(clash)

coc_get_player('92GCQQYP')
#> # A tibble: 1 × 32
#>   tag       name       town_hall_level town_hall_weapon_level exp_level trophies
#>   <chr>     <chr>                <int>                  <int>     <int>    <int>
#> 1 #92GCQQYP christoph…              14                      5       210     2534
#> # ℹ 26 more variables: best_trophies <int>, war_stars <int>, attack_wins <int>,
#> #   defense_wins <int>, builder_hall_level <int>, builder_base_trophies <int>,
#> #   best_builder_base_trophies <int>, role <chr>, war_preference <chr>,
#> #   donations <int>, donations_received <int>,
#> #   clan_capital_contributions <int>, clan_tag <chr>, clan_name <chr>,
#> #   clan_clan_level <int>, clan_badge_urls <list>,
#> #   builder_base_league_id <int>, builder_base_league_name <chr>, …
```

To get a clan, we can use:

``` r

clan <- coc_get_clan('8UC2J9OY')
clan
#> # A tibble: 1 × 34
#>   tag      name  type  description location_id location_name location_is_country
#>   <chr>    <chr> <chr> <chr>             <int> <chr>         <lgl>              
#> 1 #8UC2J9… Dust… invi… Chan: (v) …    32000249 United States TRUE               
#> # ℹ 27 more variables: location_country_code <chr>, is_family_friendly <lgl>,
#> #   badge_urls_small <chr>, badge_urls_large <chr>, badge_urls_medium <chr>,
#> #   clan_level <int>, clan_points <int>, clan_builder_base_points <int>,
#> #   clan_capital_points <int>, capital_league_id <int>,
#> #   capital_league_name <chr>, required_trophies <int>, war_frequency <chr>,
#> #   war_win_streak <int>, war_wins <int>, war_ties <int>, war_losses <int>,
#> #   is_war_log_public <lgl>, war_league_id <int>, war_league_name <chr>, …
```

This returns clan-level attributes, such as lists of members in the
clan:

``` r

clan$member_list
#> [[1]]
#> # A tibble: 22 × 15
#>    tag        name            role  townHallLevel expLevel league       trophies
#>    <chr>      <chr>           <chr>         <int>    <int> <list>          <int>
#>  1 #JY2J2QP2  Evan1125        lead…            14      209 <named list>     3134
#>  2 #92GCQQYP  christopher26   coLe…            14      210 <named list>     2534
#>  3 #LP0VGC92  bailey          coLe…            12      157 <named list>     2461
#>  4 #YQPCQ9RY  Regal           coLe…            12      156 <named list>     2276
#>  5 #LCJQ0Y2CR Cefola          coLe…            11      116 <named list>     2210
#>  6 #8L9L0YL8Y Fiore           coLe…            13      158 <named list>     2206
#>  7 #9RCGLLLY  Christopher0626 admin            11      142 <named list>     1996
#>  8 #UUUPL8G9  ziren           coLe…            10      120 <named list>     1700
#>  9 #9V8L98V   My Dad          memb…            10      107 <named list>     1656
#> 10 #LR00J0V0  J$              admin            11      126 <named list>     1604
#> # ℹ 12 more rows
#> # ℹ 8 more variables: builderBaseTrophies <int>, clanRank <int>,
#> #   previousClanRank <int>, donations <int>, donationsReceived <int>,
#> #   playerHouse <list>, builderBaseLeague_id <int>,
#> #   builderBaseLeague_name <chr>
```

## Disclaimer

**This content is not affiliated with, endorsed, sponsored, or
specifically approved by Supercell and Supercell is not responsible for
it. For more information see Supercell’s Fan Content Policy:
\<www.supercell.com/fan-content-policy\>.**

# Package index

## Clans

Access clan information

- [`coc_get_capital_raid_seasons()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_capital_raid_seasons.md)
  : Get Capital Raid Seasons
- [`coc_get_clan()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_clan.md)
  : Get a clan
- [`coc_get_clan_members()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_clan_members.md)
  : Get current clan members
- [`coc_get_clan_search()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_clan_search.md)
  : Search Clans
- [`coc_get_war_current()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_war_current.md)
  : Get current Clan War
- [`coc_get_war_log()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_war_log.md)
  : Get Clan War Log

## Players

Access player information

- [`coc_get_player()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_player.md)
  : Get a single player

## Locations

Access information for a location

- [`coc_get_location()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_location.md)
  : Get information for one location
- [`coc_get_locations()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_locations.md)
  : Get Locations
- [`coc_get_ranking_builderbase_clans()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_builderbase_clans.md)
  : Get Builder Base Clan Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_builderbase_players()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_builderbase_players.md)
  : Get Builder Base Player Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_capitals()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_capitals.md)
  : Get Capitals Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_clans()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_clans.md)
  : Get Clan Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_players()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_players.md)
  : Get Player Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_versus_clans()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_versus_clans.md)
  : Get Versus Clan Rankings
- [`coc_get_ranking_versus_players()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_ranking_versus_players.md)
  : Get Versus Player Rankings

## Leagues

Access information for leagues

- [`coc_get_builderbase_league()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_builderbase_league.md)
  : Get information for one Builder Base league
- [`coc_get_builderbase_leagues()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_builderbase_leagues.md)
  : Get Builder Base Leagues
- [`coc_get_capital_league()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_capital_league.md)
  : Get information for one capital league
- [`coc_get_capital_leagues()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_capital_leagues.md)
  : Get Capital Leagues
- [`coc_get_league()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_league.md)
  : Get information for one league
- [`coc_get_league_seaons()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_league_seaons.md)
  : Get seasons for one league
- [`coc_get_leagues()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_leagues.md)
  : Get Leagues
- [`coc_get_war_league()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_war_league.md)
  : Get information for one war league
- [`coc_get_war_leagues()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_war_leagues.md)
  : Get War Leagues

## Other functions

Other functions, including working with keys

- [`coc_get_clan_labels()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_clan_labels.md)
  : Get clan labels
- [`coc_get_goldpass()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_goldpass.md)
  : Get Gold Pass Season Information
- [`coc_get_player_labels()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/coc_get_player_labels.md)
  : Get player labels
- [`has_clash_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/key.md)
  [`get_clash_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/key.md)
  [`coc_get_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/key.md)
  [`coc_has_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/key.md)
  : Check or Get Clash of Clans API Key
- [`set_clash_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/set_clash_key.md)
  [`coc_set_key()`](http://christophertkenny.com/clash/reference/set_clash_key.md)
  : Add Entry to Renviron
